content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 6, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 6 focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud infrastructure, refactoring the `plugin-lifeops` monolith into modular components, and resolving credit ledger inconsistencies. Significant progress was made in authentication flows, mobile onboarding, and enhancing context-aware prompt suggestions.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Cloud Infrastructure & Authentication Stability
*   Resolved multiple issues causing authentication loops and session drops, including fixing Steward cookie hydration and stabilizing OAuth redirect URIs ([#8280](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8280), [#8279](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8279)).
*   Improved mobile cloud onboarding and CLI auth flows by optimizing redirect handling ([#8278](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8278)).
*   Updated Steward SDK to v0.10.1 to resolve passkey challenge failures and handle MFA-required auth types ([#8271](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8271), [#8267](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8267)).
*   Fixed staging environment tenant isolation for Steward auth ([#8282](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8282)).

### Modularization & Plugin Architecture
*   Decomposed the `plugin-lifeops` monolith into a lightweight `plugin-personal-assistant` orchestrator and six specialized, domain-focused plugins ([#8277](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8277)).
*   Added a third-party registry entry for `@madeonsol/plugin-madeonsol` ([#8260](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8260)).

### Testing & CI Improvements
*   Added end-to-end smoke tests for the monetized-app loop on the `cloud:mock` stack ([#8249](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8249)).
*   Cleaned up CI workflows by removing broken wildcard route verification steps ([#8283](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8283)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Cloud & API:** [#8288](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8288), [#8281](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8281), [#8274](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8274), [#8273](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8273), [#8272](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8272), [#8270](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8270), [#8269](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8269), [#8268](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8268), [#8266](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8266), [#8265](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8265).
*   **Orchestrator & Plugins:** [#8286](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8286), [#8285](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8285), [#8275](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8275).
*   **UI & Dependencies:** [#8276](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8276), [#8284](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8284).

## CLOSED ISSUES

### Context-Aware Prompt Suggestions
*   Implemented scope-aware prompt suggestions on the `POST /api/suggestions` endpoint, allowing for deterministic, history-aware, and time-of-day-based suggestions ([#8225](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8225)).

### Credit Ledger Unification
*   Resolved the "stranded credits" issue by unifying app-credit purchases and inference spending into a single org-level ledger, ensuring consistent balance tracking and error messaging ([#8253](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8253)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
